summary: BC Factbox Document Links API (Zetadocs Replacement) - All 17 backend tests passed. Tested 5 new endpoints: GET document-links, POST upload, DELETE soft-delete, migrate-from-zetadocs, and bc_entity_to_doc_type mapping. DEMO_MODE was enabled for upload tests (SharePoint mocked).
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for these endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test documents created with TEST- prefix during testing, cleaned up via soft-delete tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: BC Factbox Document Links API fully tested. All 5 endpoints working: (1) GET /api/gpi-integration/document-links/{bc_entity}/{bc_document_no} returns empty list for unknown docs, (2) POST upload creates hub_documents with source=bc_drop and correct document_type mapping, (3) Second upload to same bc_document_no returns folder_source=matched, (4) DELETE soft-deletes records (SharePoint file preserved), (5) migrate-from-zetadocs returns migrated/skipped/errors fields. bc_entity_to_doc_type mapping verified: purchaseInvoices→AP_Invoice, purchaseOrders→Purchase_Order, salesOrders→Sales_Order. docs/bc_extension_factbox_spec.md exists with endpoint documentation.

verified: GET /api/gpi-integration/document-links/purchaseInvoices/{doc_no} returns empty list for unknown doc
GET /api/gpi-integration/document-links/salesOrders/{doc_no} works
GET /api/gpi-integration/document-links/purchaseOrders/{doc_no} works
Response contains bc_entity, bc_document_no, documents array, total count
POST upload with small file succeeds (DEMO_MODE mocked SharePoint)
Response contains success=true, file_name, sharepoint_url, folder_path, folder_source
Second upload to same bc_document_no returns folder_source=matched (not routing_rules)
Upload with 26MB+ file returns HTTP 413
Hub documents record created with source=bc_drop, bc_entity_type, document_type, folder_source
DELETE soft-deletes the record (sets deleted=True)
Response contains success=true and 'SharePoint file preserved' message
GET after delete shows fewer documents (soft-deleted docs filtered out)
DELETE nonexistent document returns 404
POST migrate-from-zetadocs returns response with migrated/skipped/errors fields
In DEMO_MODE returns migrated=0, skipped=0 with message
purchaseInvoices maps to AP_Invoice
purchaseOrders maps to Purchase_Order
salesOrders maps to Sales_Order
docs/bc_extension_factbox_spec.md exists
Contains endpoint documentation for GET, POST, DELETE, migrate-from-zetadocs
Documents all three BC entity types: purchaseInvoices, purchaseOrders, salesOrders

mocked_apis.note: SharePoint uploads are MOCKED when DEMO_MODE=true. BC documentLinks API is MOCKED in DEMO_MODE.
mocked_list: SharePoint Graph API (upload_to_sharepoint mocked in DEMO_MODE)
